result.summary: The page layout is mostly functional, but there is an issue with horizontal spacing and elements clipping on the right edge.

issues.description: The grid columns for game cards are cut off on the right side of the viewport, clipping the text and images abruptly without clear indicators of a horizontal carousel.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the grid layout to fit completely within the viewport width or add explicit scrollbars/indicators to show that the container is horizontally scrollable.
